title: Bambino By Juliana Baby Keepsake Box with Drawers
features: Remember those precious early moments, days and milestones with this beautiful keepsake box.

The lid features silver foil 'sometimes the littlest things take up the most room in your heart' titling, glitter starry night design and a crystal encrusted silver plated teddy bear icon. The box is tied with a luxury grey grosgrain ribbon.
The box is tied with a luxury grey grosgrain ribbon.
Inside is a compartment for their: first shoes, cards and keepsakes, keepsakes and treasures, memories and mittens, precious things and a 3.5" x 5" oval aperture lidded box.
